title: Slavonski Brod, Slavonski Brod-Posavina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Slavonski Brod, Slavonski Brod-Posavina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Slavonski Brod is a city in Slavonski Brod-Posavina with a population of 53,473. A city in eastern Croatia on the Sava River, known for the Brod Fortress, a vibrant cultural scene, and its strategic location on the border with Bosnia.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
